privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Magento store configuration task for a fictional pottery studio called 'Terra & Clay Studio'. The metadata claims are accurate specifications of what the task requires: store name (Terra & Clay Studio), phone number using the real 505 New Mexico area code with fictional 555 exchange ((505) 555-0142), real Santa Fe New Mexico location (ZIP 87501, Santa Fe city, Canyon Road street), and fictional contact emails (hello@terraandclay.com, orders@terraandclay.com, support@terraandclay.com). The geographic location data (Santa Fe, ZIP 87501, Canyon Road) is real, while the business identity and contact information is synthetic.
